meta.question: Does this model contain any parallel gateways? (Model ID: 0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, the model with ID 0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c contains 2 parallel gateways. Neither of these gateways has an assigned name. The URIs for these gateways are:
- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-A7373EDE-B1FD-4798-AF2C-A69407BC8035
- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-8CA25B2E-6393-4BC2-BA1F-CA06A1BEC1F7

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gateway ?name WHERE {
  ?gateway a bboExt:ParallelGateway .
  ?gateway tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c" .
  OPTIONAL { ?gateway bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query successfully identified two parallel gateways in the specified model. Both gateways exist but do not have assigned names.

- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-8CA25B2E-6393-4BC2-BA1F-CA06A1BEC1F7
